title: BBS Machinima pack
description: All you need in performance and decoration to make good machinimas with the BBS Mod, by McHorse!
body:
# **The Perfect Modpack to make Machinimas**
That modpack is made by Nioum, because nobody should lag during making machinimas with good shaders.

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a878121721f35acb126ff78db905ea7d64591736.png)

💙 BBS Mod, made to make animations in Minecraft.
⚠️ Starting from 3.4.3, the modpack now uses BBS CML Edition, the fan continuation.

💙 Fully optimized mods - with Shader Support (Sodium & Iris, Noisium, ImmediatelyFast,...)

💙 Contains decoration mods (Explosive Enhancement, Falling Leaves,...)

💙 Integration of Essential, to make Machinimas with your friends!
